about.title: Building enterprise solutions that make people's work easier.
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full Stack Developer currently working as a Power Platform Developer at ARLANXEO, where I build enterprise applications, automate business processes and integrate corporate systems used by international teams.
about.paragraph2: My daily work combines React, JavaScript, Python, SharePoint, Power Apps, Power Automate and Power BI to deliver scalable solutions focused on productivity, digital transformation and user experience.
about.paragraph3: Besides Microsoft technologies, I enjoy building modern web applications, studying software architecture and exploring AI, automation and cloud technologies.
about.experienceText: Power Platform Developer at ARLANXEO developing enterprise solutions for international teams.
about.technologiesText: React • TypeScript • Power Apps • Power Automate • SharePoint • Python • Node.js • Power BI

expertise.title: A technical stack focused on business impact.
expertise.description: My experience combines enterprise applications, automation, web development and system integrations to deliver practical solutions for real business problems.

projects.title: Real solutions for automation, business apps and web development.

contact.title: Let's build something together.
contact.description: I'm open to opportunities involving React, Power Platform, automation, SharePoint, Python and full stack development.
